seo.title: Professional Services — Survey, Design, Installation & Consultation | Jal Agritech
seo.description: End-to-end professional services from Jal Agritech — site survey, landscape and irrigation design, turn-key installation, on-site supervision, and post-project consultation.
seo.keywords: agriculture services, irrigation design, landscape design, project survey, turn-key installation, agriculture consultation, jal agritech services

cards.title: Survey & Design
cards.description: Site assessment, soil testing, plant selection, and complete project blueprint preparation.

cards.title: Turn-Key Installation
cards.description: Single-vendor installation of irrigation, landscape, and plantation systems with quality materials.

topics.title: Survey & Site Assessment
intro: Every project starts with a structured site visit. Our team measures elevation, traces the water source, tests soil at multiple depths, surveys existing plant life, and notes constraints (overhead lines, root barriers, drainage paths). The output is a fully costed project blueprint — not a rough quote.
topics.highlight: Site survey, soil tests, water-source tracing, and existing-vegetation audit — captured into a single costed blueprint.

sections.title: What's Included in a Site Survey
list: Topographic survey with elevation and slope readings
Soil testing at multiple depths (texture, pH, nutrients)
Existing vegetation audit and species mapping
Obstruction and utility mapping (cables, pipes, root barriers)

topics.title: Design & Planning
intro: Once the survey is in, our irrigation engineers and landscape architects translate the data into a working design — hydraulic plan, planting plan, and BOQ. We design for the climate, the budget, and the client's maintenance preferences (DIY vs AMC) from day one.

sections.title: Design Deliverables
list: Hydraulic layout with pipe sizing and pressure calculations
Planting plan with species selection and density

topics.title: Turn-Key Installation
intro: We handle everything from civil work to commissioning under a single PO — no juggling sub-contractors. Our crews bring trained supervisors, calibrated equipment, and standard QA checklists to every site. The handover includes a working demonstration and an operations manual.
topics.highlight: Survey → design → install → supply → maintain. One team, one PO, one accountability line — saving you time, cost, and coordination headaches.

sections.title: Scope of a Turn-Key Project
list: Civil work — trenching, foundations, retaining walls
Sprinkler and dripper placement with flow balancing

topics.title: Consultation & Support
intro: For clients who already have a team but need expertise on a specific decision — crop choice, irrigation scheduling, Miyawaki species mix, drainage strategy — we offer paid consultation. Either as a fixed-scope advisory or as ongoing technical support.

sections.title: Common Consultation Engagements
list: Crop and species selection for new sites
Miyawaki species mix and density planning
Project-management advisory for large landscape builds
